description: Skill trigger-boundary pressure scenarios. Baseline covers existing tutor and Speckit skills (T018); tutor-reading scenarios added in T033; tutor-lesson scenarios added in T049.

scenarios.prompt: I want to review my due vocabulary cards.
Correct these three sentences I wrote.
Show me my progress and weak patterns.
Set up my tutor profile for Ukrainian.
Generate the implementation plan for this feature.
Give me a short Ukrainian passage and ask me comprehension questions.
Let me practice reconstructing a text transcript in Ukrainian.
I want to read something and answer questions, not write my own essay.
Teach me a short lesson on my weakest grammar tag with one practice item.
Give me a quick guided lesson on verbs of motion, then one exercise.
Don't just show my stats — actually teach me one weak area briefly.
